config.cell_description: ZH-ID opposed persona natural cell: CN persona in Mandarin Chinese vs ID persona in Indonesian
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
prompts.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
prompts.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If {lang} is Indonesian or English, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If {lang} is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.
prompts.probe:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

debate.cell_description: ZH-ID opposed persona natural cell: CN persona in Mandarin Chinese vs ID persona in Indonesian
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: 我不同意这个说法。在中国，我们强调集体利益与个人责任的结合，但个体权利同样重要。社会应保障每个人的自由和尊严，才能实现真正的和谐发展。尊重个人权利是维护社会稳定的基础。

Saya tidak setuju dengan pendapat mereka. Di Indonesia, nilai kebersamaan dan tanggung jawab sosial sering ditekankan, tetapi hak individu juga penting untuk dijaga agar masyarakat tetap adil. Kebijakan yang hanya fokus pada kepentingan kelompok bisa mengorbankan kebebasan seseorang, yang justru merusak harmoni masyarakat jangka panjang. Diperlukan keseimbangan antara kedua hal itu.
我不完全同意印尼人的观点。中国一直注重集体利益，但也重视个人权利，不能只牺牲个体而追求整体。政策制定时需兼顾公平与效率，否则可能引发矛盾。真正的发展需要两者相辅相成，而非对立。

Saya masih tidak sepenuhnya setuju dengan pendapat mereka. Di Indonesia, kesadaran akan kebutuhan kolektif sering kali mendominasi, namun ini bisa memicu ketimpangan jika tidak ada perlindungan terhadap hak-hak individu. Kebijakan yang terlalu dominan atas nama kepentingan umum bisa melupakan kebutuhan spesifik rakyat. Perlu ada pengawasan yang tepat agar kebijakan tidak hanya mengejar hasil tanpa memperhatikan keadilan.
我不完全认同印尼人的看法。中国在强调集体利益的同时，也通过法律制度保护公民的基本权利。如果忽视个体需求，单纯追求集体目标，容易导致社会失衡。因此，在制定政策时必须平衡各方利益，确保公平与效率并存。

Saya masih tidak sepenuhnya setuju dengan argumen mereka. Di Indonesia, sistem hukum sering kurang efektif dalam melindungi hak-hak individu secara penuh, sehingga keputusan kolektif bisa melanggar kebebasan seseorang. Jika hanya fokus pada kepentingan besar, maka kelompok minoritas mungkin tertinggal. Penting bagi negara untuk memastikan bahwa kebijakan tidak hanya mengejar kebaikan bersama tanpa memberikan ruang bagi keberagaman.
